---
title: "OBIS Training Slides"
subtitle: "Pick a deck to open it as a full-screen presentation"
format:
  html:
    theme: [obis_theme.scss]
    css: [custom.css]
---

## General Training Decks

1. [FAIR Data & Biodiversity](index-fair-data.qmd) 
2. [Darwin Core and DNA-Derived Data](index-dna-extension.qmd)
3. [OBIS Quality Control](index-qc.qmd)
4. [Publishing & IPT](index-publishing.qmd)   
5. [Accessing OBIS (DNA) Data](index-access.qmd) 

## Other decks

- [Publishing eDNA Data in OBIS (full deck)](index-edna-full.qmd)
